name: Retail Property Inspection
description: Commercial retail property condition assessment — includes storefront and loading dock systems.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Grading & Drainage was inspected and appears in serviceable condition.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible, accessible components at the time of inspection.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Grading & Drainage requires repair or further evaluation by a qualified professional.

defects.title: Repair needed

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Storefront glass and framing was inspected and appears in serviceable condition. Seals are intact with no visible fogging or cracks.

information.title: Tempered glass
information.comment: Storefront glazing is tempered safety glass per code requirements.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible glass surfaces; thermal performance and structural glazing integrity not tested.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Storefront glass shows seal failure, chips, or cracks; recommend evaluation and replacement by a glazing contractor.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Storefront glass presents a safety hazard due to cracking or improper glazing; recommend immediate remediation.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Exterior signage and mounting hardware was inspected and appears in serviceable condition.

information.title: Illumination functional
information.comment: Illuminated signage is operational with all lamps and transformers functioning.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible signage and mounting; electrical connections behind fascia not fully accessible.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Signage shows deterioration, failed illumination, or loose mounting; recommend repair by a sign contractor.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Signage mounting is compromised and poses a falling hazard; recommend immediate securing or removal.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Customer entry doors and hardware were inspected and appear in serviceable condition. Automatic closers and ADA-compliant features are operational.

information.title: Automatic doors
information.comment: Automatic entry doors are operational with functioning sensors and safety reversals.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible door hardware, closers, and access features.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Customer entry doors require adjustment, hardware replacement, or closer repair by a qualified door technician.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Customer entry presents a safety concern due to malfunctioning closer, broken glass, or trip hazard; recommend immediate correction.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Dock doors were inspected and appear in serviceable condition. Overhead doors operate smoothly with functional safety mechanisms.

information.title: Insulated doors
information.comment: Dock doors are insulated and equipped with perimeter weather seals to maintain interior climate.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible door panels, tracks, and hardware; motor internals not tested.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Dock doors require repair — damaged panels, worn seals, or malfunctioning opener observed; recommend service by a dock door specialist.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Dock door presents a safety hazard due to failed safety reversal or broken cable; recommend immediate lock-out and repair.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Dock levelers were inspected and appear in serviceable condition. Lip extends and retracts properly.

information.title: Hydraulic operation
information.comment: Hydraulic dock levelers operate smoothly with no visible fluid leaks.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to surface operation; hydraulic cylinders and pit conditions below deck not fully accessible.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Dock levelers show wear, hydraulic leaks, or lip malfunction; recommend service by a loading dock equipment specialist.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Dock area lighting was inspected and appears adequate for safe loading and unloading operations.

information.title: LED fixtures
information.comment: Dock lighting utilizes LED fixtures providing adequate lumen output for safe operations.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible light fixtures and general illumination levels; lux measurements not taken.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Dock lighting is insufficient or fixtures are damaged; recommend replacement to ensure safe loading operations.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Dock area has inadequate lighting creating a safety hazard for personnel and equipment operators; recommend immediate correction.
